path: Problem: Flag the most recent timestamp within each group defined by one or more criteria
Action: Use an array MAX(IF()) to compute the group-wise maximum, then IF() to label current row as latest vs not latest

Observation: MAX(IF(criteria_range=criteria_value, timestamp_range)) returns the latest timestamp for the matching group; comparing it to the current row’s timestamp enables row-level classification (requires array entry in Excel 2013)
